message:
feat(engine): add 68 deep integration tests for semantic flattening and evidence contracts

- semantic_flattening_inventory (30 tests): inventory lifecycle, content-hash determinism,
  classification filtering, summary aggregation, serde, Display impls
- evidence_contract (38 tests): validation exhaustive paths, EV tier boundaries,
  rollout ordering, version compat, multi-error accumulation, serde roundtrips

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
